tasks.name: Start enrollment for the cheapest full-time toddler program within 5 miles of ZIP 94105 under $1,500/month
tasks.description: Find toddler programs, filter to full-time options within 5 miles of ZIP 94105 costing no more than $1,500/month, sort by price, and begin the enrollment process for the cheapest matching program.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled 'Programs' and then select 'Find a Program'.
In the age group filter section, select the checkbox or option labeled 'Toddlers (2–3 years)'.
In the location search area, type '94105' into the ZIP code field and set the distance dropdown to 'Within 5 miles'.
In the schedule filter, select the option labeled 'Full-time (5 days per week)'.
In the tuition or price filter, locate the maximum monthly tuition field and enter '1500' as the upper limit.
Open the sort dropdown for the program results and choose 'Price: Low to High'.
Click on the first program card in the sorted results list (the cheapest matching program) to open its detail page, then click the 'Start Enrollment' button on that program detail page.

tasks.name: Schedule a weekday morning tour at the Downtown Campus between June 10–20
tasks.description: Book an in-person tour at the Downtown Campus on a weekday morning between June 10 and June 20, for one child aged 3, by completing and submitting the tour request form.
steps: From the homepage, click the main navigation link labeled 'Visit Us' or 'Schedule a Tour'.
On the visit page, select the option labeled 'In-person tour' if multiple visit types are shown.
In the location dropdown menu, choose 'Downtown Campus' as the desired center.
Open the date picker and select a weekday (Monday through Friday) with a date between 'June 10' and 'June 20'.
Open the time dropdown and select a start time between '10:00 AM' and '11:30 AM'.
In the 'Number of children' field on the form, enter '1'.
In the 'Child age' field, enter '3' as the child's age.
Fill in the parent/guardian name field with 'Alex Rivera' and the email field with 'alex.rivera@example.com'.
Click the 'Request Tour' or 'Submit' button to complete the tour booking request.

tasks.name: Join the waitlist for the cheaper of half-day and full-day preschool programs for a 4-year-old at Lakeside Campus
tasks.description: Compare one half-day and one full-day preschool program for 4-year-olds at the Lakeside Campus, identify which has the lower annual tuition, and join the waitlist for that cheaper program.
steps: From the homepage, click on 'Programs' in the main navigation and select 'Preschool (3–5 years)'.
In the age filter on the preschool page, select the option for '4-year-olds' or equivalent (e.g., 'Age 4').
In the campus/location filter, choose 'Lakeside Campus'.
In the schedule filter section, ensure that both 'Half-day' and 'Full-day' options are checked so that both types appear in the list.
In the program results list, check the 'Compare' box for the first program labeled as 'Half-day' and the first program labeled as 'Full-day'.
Click the 'Compare selected' button to open the comparison view of the two selected programs.
On the comparison page, examine the annual tuition values for both programs and determine which program has the lower annual tuition.
Under the program with the lower annual tuition, click the 'Join Waitlist' button.
On the waitlist form, enter the child’s name as 'Jordan Lee' and select 'September' as the desired start month from the dropdown, then click the 'Continue' or 'Next' button to reach the summary step.

tasks.name: Use the tuition calculator to create a 3-day extended schedule for an infant under a $1,000 monthly budget and save the quote
tasks.description: Use the tuition calculator to configure an infant schedule on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday from 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM, set a maximum monthly budget of $1,000, calculate the tuition, and save the resulting quote.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Tuition & Schedules' link in the main navigation.
On the Tuition & Schedules page, click on the tool or button labeled 'Tuition calculator' or 'Estimate your tuition'.
In the age group selector within the calculator, choose 'Infants (0–18 months)'.
In the days-of-week selection area, select 'Monday', 'Wednesday', and 'Friday' as the attendance days.
In the drop-off time dropdown, select '8:00 AM', and in the pick-up time dropdown, select '6:00 PM'.
In the budget or maximum monthly cost field, type '1000' to set a $1,000 monthly budget limit.
Click the 'Calculate tuition' or 'Get estimate' button to generate the tuition estimate.
After the estimate is displayed, click the 'Save this quote' or 'Save estimate' button.
In the save quote form, enter 'parent@example.com' into the email field and type 'Infant M/W/F extended' into the quote name field, then click the 'Save Quote' button.

tasks.name: Find a highly rated toddler teacher with 5+ years of experience and add them to favorites
tasks.description: Filter staff profiles to show toddler teachers with at least 5 years of experience and ratings of 4.5 stars or higher, then open the top-rated profile and add that teacher to the favorites list.
steps: From the homepage, click the navigation link labeled 'Our Teachers' or 'Meet the Staff'.
In the role or age group filter controls, select the option for 'Toddler teachers (2–3 years)' or similar.
Locate the experience filter (slider, dropdown, or checkboxes) and set the minimum experience to '5' years.
In the rating filter, choose or check the option '4.5 stars & up'.
Open the sort dropdown for the staff results and select 'Rating: High to Low'.
Click on the first teacher profile card in the filtered, sorted results to open that teacher’s detailed profile.
On the teacher’s profile page, click the 'Add to favorites' or 'Save as preferred teacher' button.
If prompted to label the favorite, type 'Preferred toddler teacher' into the label field and click the 'Save' button.

tasks.name: RSVP to the first two free weekend family events next month in the afternoon and register 3 attendees for each
tasks.description: Use the events calendar to go to next month, filter for free family events on Saturday and Sunday afternoons, and submit RSVPs for the first two events in the filtered list with 3 attendees each.
steps: From the homepage, click the main navigation link labeled 'Events & Calendar'.
In the month navigation controls on the calendar, click the 'Next Month' arrow or button to move to the following month.
In the event type filter section, select the option for 'Family events'.
In the price filter, choose the option labeled 'Free' or 'Free events only'.
In the day-of-week filter, select or check both 'Saturday' and 'Sunday'.
In the time-of-day filter, select 'Afternoon (12 PM – 5 PM)'.
In the filtered list or calendar view, click on the first event shown and then click its 'RSVP' or 'Register' button.
Fill out the RSVP form for that first event by entering '3' in the 'Number of attendees' or equivalent field and submitting the form using the 'Submit RSVP' or 'Confirm' button.
Return to the filtered event list and repeat the RSVP process for the second event in the list by clicking its 'RSVP' or 'Register' button, entering '3' attendees, and submitting that RSVP form.

tasks.name: Search FAQs about potty training and send a contact form with a related question
tasks.description: Search the FAQ section for potty training information, open a relevant article, then use the linked contact form to send a message with the subject 'Curriculum & Potty Training' asking when potty training support begins.
steps: From the homepage, click the navigation item labeled 'Help & FAQs' or 'Parent Resources'.
In the FAQ search field, type 'potty training' and activate the search using the search button or Enter key.
From the search results, click on the first article whose title or snippet mentions 'potty training'.
On the article page, click the button or link labeled 'Still have questions? Contact us' or similar.
On the contact form, open the subject dropdown and select 'Curriculum & Potty Training' from the list of topics.
In the message text area, type the question: 'When do you start potty training support during the day?'.
Fill in the name field with 'Taylor Morgan' and the phone number field with '555-123-4567'.
Click the 'Send Message' or 'Submit' button to send the question through the contact form.

tasks.name: Sign up for the email newsletter with specific topics and center preferences
tasks.description: Use the newsletter signup form in the site footer to subscribe with a specific name, email, ZIP code, two selected topics, a preferred center, and two child age ranges.
steps: On any page of the site, scroll down to the footer and click the link or button labeled 'Email Newsletter Signup' or 'Stay in touch'.
In the full name field on the signup form, enter 'Casey Patel'.
In the email address field, enter 'casey.patel@example.com'.
In the ZIP/postal code field, type '10001'.
In the topics or interests checklist, select the options 'Monthly Newsletter' and 'Special Events Only'.
In the preferred center dropdown, choose 'Riverside Campus'.
In the child age range section, select the checkboxes for 'Infants (0–18 months)' and 'Toddlers (2–3 years)'.
Click the 'Sign Up' or 'Subscribe' button to complete the newsletter subscription.
